alkylation reagent: alkylated with 20 mM iodoacetamide for 45 min in the dark.
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 20 mM iodoacetamide for 45 min in the dark.
enrichment method: High-Select TM Fe-NTA Phosphopeptide Enrichment Kit
Phosphorylated peptides were enriched using a High-Select TM Fe-NTA Phosphopeptide Enrichment Kit.
fragmentation method: analyzed by tandem mass spectrometry on a Q_Exactive HF-X instrument.
instrument: analyzed by tandem mass spectrometry on a Q_Exactive HF-X instrument.
labeling: isotopically labeled using tandem mass tags (TMTs).
reduction concentration: reduced with 5 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) at 37 °C for 2 h.
